query:
Here is an establishment or group in the CHR sector (Cafés, Hotels, or Restaurants): Belga Queen and its website http://www.gaufresbelgaqueen.com.
Optionnaly here is the address 44 Mail de Lannoy, Roubaix 59100, FR and country code FR

I need to understand its current affiliation and group size.

1.  Determine whether this establishment is independent or part of a larger group
2.  If it is part of a group, determine the total number of locations owned by this group.

CRITICAL DEFINITIONS & CONSTRAINTS:

- Establishment Scope: Consider all food service businesses (restaurants, cafes, hotels, bakery, bars) the CHR sector.
- Input Flexibility: The name and domain provided may refer to a single location or the larger parent group. 
In all cases, these are the starting points for your search.
- Total Locations Calculation (Group definition): The term owns must be interpreted in the broadest sense. The total number of locations must be the sum of all sites directly owned/operate PLUS all sites operated via franchise agreements (Total = Owned + Franchised).
- Use the group's webpage centralizing all their locations, often called "our locations," "nos restaurants," or "store locator." to check the number of locations they display there.
- Final Result Selection: The final number of locations reported must be the highest total number found across all sources (webpage, store locator, reports, etc.). If only one location is found, the result is 1.
answer:
### Executive Summary
Belga Queen operates as the parent company of a franchise network specializing in artisanal Belgian waffles, rather than a single independent establishment [Franchise de gaufres - Devenir franchisé avec Belga Queen](https://gaufresbelgaqueen.com/franchise-de-gaufres-restauration-rapide/). Based on the highest total number found across official and press sources, the group currently operates a total of **7 locations** (combining both corporate-owned and franchised sites) [Une 7ème ouverture pour Belga Queen, avec un nouveau kiosque à Montivilliers (Le Havre)](https://lexpress-franchise.com/franchise/belga-queen/actualites/une-7eme-ouverte-pour-belga-queen-avec-un-nouveau-kiosque-a-montivilliers-le-havre/). 

### Corporate Affiliation and Structure
The establishment located at 44 Mail de Lannoy, 59100 Roubaix is part of a larger corporate structure operating under the legal entity BELGA QUEEN (SIREN 811 897 115) [Les entreprises 44 Mail De Lannoy 59100 Roubaix sur Societe.com](https://www.societe.com/entreprises/44_mail%20de%20lannoy/59100_ROUBAIX.html). 

*   **Leadership & Headquarters:** The company was created on May 5, 2015, and is headquartered at 955 Domaine de la Vigne, 59910 Bondues [Société BELGA QUEEN à BONDUES (Chiffre d'affaires, bilans, résultat) avec Verif.com - Siren 811897115](https://www.verif.com/societe/BELGA-QUEEN-811897115). It is led by President Candice Grimonprez (nom d'usage Raguet) and Director General Patrick Raguet [Société BELGA QUEEN : Chiffre d'affaires, statuts, extrait d'immatriculation](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/belga-queen-811897115).
*   **Business Model:** Originally operating direct points of sale, the company began deploying its concept under a brand license (licence de marque) franchise model in 2022 [Franchise BELGA QUEEN dans Franchise Crêperie - Gaufre](https://www.toute-la-franchise.com/franchise/belga-queen). The network utilizes five distinct formats: kiosk containers, foodtrucks, stores, counters, and event trolleys [L’enseigne de baraques à gaufres Belga Queen débarque sur Toute la Franchise](https://www.toute-la-franchise.com/news-enseigne-baraques-a-gaufres-belga-queen-debarque-toute-la-franchise).

### Group Size and Location Analysis
The highest verified number of locations operated by the Belga Queen group is **7**. This milestone was recently announced in a press release dated May 8, 2026, which celebrated the network's "7th opening" with a new kiosk in Montivilliers [Une 7ème ouverture pour Belga Queen, avec un nouveau kiosque à Montivilliers (Le Havre)](https://lexpress-franchise.com/franchise/belga-queen/actualites/une-7eme-ouverte-pour-belga-queen-avec-un-nouveau-kiosque-a-montivilliers-le-havre/). 

The official brand website corroborates a footprint of 7 distinct geographic points of sale [Où trouver nos gaufres belges Belga Queen](https://gaufresbelgaqueen.com/points-de-vente-belga-queen):
1.  **Roubaix (McArthurGlen):** 44 rue Mail de Lannoy, 59100 Roubaix
2.  **Roubaix (L'Usine):** 228 avenue Alfred Motte, 59100 Roubaix
3.  **Englos:** Les Geants, Cc Auchan, Rte Nationale 352, 59320 Englos
4.  **Le Havre:** Centre commercial COTY, 22 Rue Casimir Périer, 76600 Le Havre
5.  **Reims:** Galerie Espace d’Erlon, Place Drouet d’Erlon, 51100 Reims
6.  **Romans-sur-Isère:** Marques Avenue, 60 avenue Gambetta, 26100 Romans-sur-Isère
7.  **Valence:** 18 Rue Emile Augier, 26000 Valence (opened in early 2026 by an existing franchisee) [Belga Queen s'implante à Valence dans la Drôme](https://lexpress-franchise.com/franchise/belga-queen/actualites/belga-queen-etend-son-empreinte-avec-une-nouvelle-implantation-a-valence/)

*Note on Data Discrepancies:* Franchise directories present conflicting historical data. "Toute la Franchise" lists only 1 location [Franchise BELGA QUEEN dans Franchise Crêperie - Gaufre - Toute la Franchise](https://www.toute-la-franchise.com/franchise/belga-queen), while a May 2026 article simultaneously headlines a "7th opening" but lists "5 implantations" in its sidebar [Une 7ème ouverture pour Belga Queen, avec un nouveau kiosque à Montivilliers (Le Havre)](https://lexpress-franchise.com/franchise/belga-queen/actualites/une-7eme-ouverte-pour-belga-queen-avec-un-nouveau-kiosque-a-montivilliers-le-havre/). Following the directive to report the highest supported number, the total is 7.

### Brand Ambiguity and Unrelated Entities
When assessing the group, it is critical to separate the French waffle franchise from other entities sharing the "Belga Queen" name:
*   **Belgian Restaurants:** There is an iconic, high-end restaurant named Belga Queen in Brussels (reopened in September 2024 under operators Nemo Luyckx and Lilit Miskaryan) and a bankrupt location in Ghent [Bruxelles : que vaut l’iconique Belga Queen depuis sa réouverture ? - SoSoir](https://sosoir.lesoir.be/639493/article/2024-12-01/bruxelles-que-vaut-liconique-belga-queen-depuis-sa-reouverture) [Le Belga Queen en réorganisation à Bruxelles et en faillite à Gand | L'Echo](https://www.lecho.be/entreprises/horeca/le-belga-queen-en-reorganisation-a-bruxelles-et-en-faillite-a-gand/10032137.html). These are distinct from the French waffle franchise.
*   **Closed French Entities:** Two other French entities previously operated under the name BELGA QUEEN—one in Nice (SIREN 799 745 864, liquidated in April 2019) and one in Paris (SIREN 528 199 110, closed) [SAS Belga Queen (06300) : siret, siren, TVA, adresse...](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/sas-belga-queen-06/entreprise-799745864) [BELGA QUEEN (PARIS) Chiffre d'affaires, résultat, bilans sur SOCIETE.COM - 528199110](https://www.societe.com/societe/belga-queen-528199110.html). 

### Gaps and Limitations
*   **Owned vs. Franchised Split:** The findings do not specify the exact ratio of corporate-owned locations versus franchised locations within the 7 active sites.
*   **Legal Form Contradiction:** Corporate registry sources conflict on whether the parent company BELGA QUEEN (SIREN 811 897 115) is structured as a Société à responsabilité limitée (SARL) or a Société par actions simplifiée (SAS).
